prompt: Using the reference sketch as guidance, generate a realistic photograph of a white flower in a garden. The flower should be in sharp focus, with the background and surroundings softly blurred.
prompt_refined: Generate a photorealistic image of multiple white gladiolus-like flowers on a single stalk, adhering to the compositional arrangement and structural details depicted in image 1. These flowers should be positioned centrally or slightly to the right within a vibrant garden setting. Ensure the flowers are in sharp focus, while the garden background and surroundings are rendered with a soft, natural bokeh blur.
objects: multiple white gladiolus-like flowers (adhering to compositional arrangement and structural details of image 1)
single stalk (adhering to structural details of image 1)
leaves (adhering to structural details of image 1)
flowers positioned centrally or slightly to the right
garden background with soft, natural bokeh blur
